response.justification: Critical C++ experience gap. The role requires 8 years of C++ programming; the resume shows only ~1 year of commercial experience at National Instruments plus hobby projects. While the candidate demonstrates solid infrastructure, distributed systems, and technical mentoring capabilities, insufficient C++ expertise is disqualifying for a cloud compute platform technical leadership position.
strengths: Proven expertise scaling distributed systems to high throughput (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby microservices architecture)
Strong technical leadership background through formal teaching, workshop design, and establishing software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Demonstrated ability to ship production systems at scale (top 10 Apple TV app, millions of emails annually at Optilyz)
concerns: Severely insufficient C++ experience (requires 8 years, resume shows ~1 year at National Instruments)
Limited evidence of deep cloud architecture specialization despite AWS CDK and Kubernetes exposure
Generalist career across multiple languages and domains rather than specialization in systems-level C++ or compute infrastructure
